title: Momonosuke Faces Wano’s Future
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Kozuki Alliance, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Right, I see it too... it's peculiar. He may be a foreign pirate,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But he reminds me so much of the former Daimyo of Ringo when he was young!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He and SHIMOTSUKI USHIMARU are like two peas in a pod!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Right down to their sword handling, it's uncanny!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ushimaru-sama was a fantastic swordsman, a direct design- dant of the god of the blade, SHIMOTSUKI RVUMA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And this young man was the one to finally return shusui to wano!! It must be fate or something..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: After all, Ryuma...

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: ...was a one-eyed Samurail!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Second Floor - TreasureE Repository

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We've got to back up Jack- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We're not gonna let that happen!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Bar- AAG!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must be getting tired!! I'll put you to sleep forever, Duke of the day!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no need to draw this out. I've already forgiven you for lying to me about the Samural...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your country's already paid the price for sheltering him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: PANT PANT

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We wouldn't have been able to live with ourselves...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: PANT PANT

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...if we sold Ra120 out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would've made it impossible for us to come back to Wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I swear to God...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: everything we went through...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...since the day open-sama left us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...was to get to this point!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I don't know this Ra120!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If he's here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'll slice open my own stomach!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since that day 20 years ago, we've tormented ourselves with the same questions...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: "Are things different now?"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Do we still have the right to claim to be oden's Samurai?"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: How...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: How are you in your sulong form...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: A hole in the roof....?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ashura!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Grrr...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We endured a lot to reach this decisive battle,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our millennia old city was razed to the ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the dawn of the world is finally upon us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We We We Don't Care If We Have To Lay Down Our Lives To Usher It In!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
